change: Default verifier selected GEMV profile uses 64 threads and enables HBM-staged selected SiLU/down-rotate + ids-tensor down GEMV for tokens>1 (HIPENGINE_SELECTED_MOE_DOWN_STAGED=1 default).

acceptance_summary.unit_kernel_correctness: pytest targeted tests pass; tiny FP16 GPU staged-down equals unfused silu_mul_dual_rotate_out + selected down GEMV bit-for-bit (down_equal/out_equal true, max_abs 0.0)
acceptance_summary.rocprof: default path reduces kernel calls/pass and kernel time/pass vs prior 128-thread unfused selected-down baseline

commands.pycompile_pytest: PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m py_compile ... && PYTHONPATH=. pytest -q tests/test_qwen35_decode_state.py::test_qwen35_decode_state_selected_moe_down_fp16_uses_staged_keyed_kernel tests/test_qwen35_decode_state.py::test_qwen35_decode_state_selected_moe_fp16_uses_staged_keyed_rotate tests/test_qwen35_decode_state.py::test_qwen35_decode_state_runs_moe_c1_fp16_chain_in_parent_order tests/test_paro_awq_gemv_plan.py
commands.tiny_kernel_correctness: inline Python GPU comparison in WORKLOG; old silu+selected_down vs new staged_down keyed
commands.mtp_smoke: ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/mtp_chain_e2e_smoke.py --decode-tokens 4 --candidate-budget 3 --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode batched --graph-mode off --json /tmp/mtp_smoke_selected_threads64_down_staged_default_d4.json
commands.dflash_smoke: ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/dflash_chain_e2e_bench.py --target-model /models/hipengine/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-PARO-full4096-e5-packed-MTP-BF16 --drafter-model /home/lhl/.cache/huggingface/hub/models--z-lab--Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-DFlash/snapshots/42d3b34d588423cdae7ba8f53a8cf7789346a719 --backend hip_gfx1100 --max-prompts 1 --decode-tokens 4 --draft-budgets 3 --verifier-mode native_bulk_bplus1 --full-attn-chain-mode batched --verifier-graph off --tree-mode chain --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --json /tmp/dflash_chain_selected_threads64_down_staged_default_35b_1p4t.json
commands.rocprof_baseline_prior: (captured before this change, prior default selected_threads=128/unfused selected-down) ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt HIPENGINE_SELECTED_MOE_DOWN_STAGED=0 PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/mtp_verifier_rocprof.py --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode batched --decode-tokens 4 --candidate-budget 3 --steady-state-skip 0 --out /tmp/mtp_rocprof_selected_down_staged_off.json
commands.rocprof_default_new: ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 HIPENGINE_HIP_ARCH=gfx1100 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/mtp_verifier_rocprof.py --backend hip_gfx1100 --chain-attn-mode batched --decode-tokens 4 --candidate-budget 3 --steady-state-skip 0 --out /tmp/mtp_rocprof_selected_threads64_down_staged_default.json

thread64_unfused_control.note: Faster than the staged default but does not reduce kernel launch count; kept as opt-out via HIPENGINE_SELECTED_MOE_DOWN_STAGED=0.

notes: The prior baseline was captured before the 64-thread selected GEMV default change; rerunning the command at this commit with HIPENGINE_SELECTED_MOE_DOWN_STAGED=0 gives the documented thread64_unfused_control row instead.
The selected MoE gate/up staged rotate path remains default-off because it reduces launches but regresses kernel time.

The staged-down default is a narrower first slice: it removes the selected-down silu/rotate launch for verifier tokens>1 while the 64-thread selected GEMV profile offsets the staged barrier overhead relative to the previous default.
performance_claim=false because this is a verifier-window diagnostic/smoke, not a full prompt-suite throughput promotion.
